element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Random enemy encounters during dungeon navigation
Meeting and recruiting up to 7 additional party members throughout journey
Puzzle solving, environment navigation, hidden item discovery
AP management and tactical spell selection in battles
Purchasing and finding items to strengthen characters
Unlocking Ryu's latent dragon transformation abilities

element_introduction_order.element: Boss encounters with hidden health mechanics
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Boss characters with obscured remaining health after health bar depletion
Navigating through dungeons filled with traps and monsters

typical_relief_triggers: Entering towns for shopping and NPC interaction
typical_tension_triggers: Random enemy encounters every few steps
Boss battles with unknown remaining health
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical tension through frequent random encounters balanced by town exploration and narrative progression. Story-driven advancement requires entering dangerous areas but rewards with party growth and unlocked abilities.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Hidden items discoverable through character Personal Actions in specific locations
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Unique field abilities enable access to hidden areas and collectibles

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat with basic enemies, tutorial through game mechanics via gameplay rather than explicit instruction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased dungeon complexity with traps, stronger random encounters, introduction of boss battles with tactical depth
difficulty_curve.late_game: Mastery of dragon transformation abilities, complex boss fights with hidden health mechanics, end-game story scenarios
notable_spikes: First major boss encounter introducing hidden health bar mechanic
Mid-game dungeons with trap navigation requirements
Late-game story scenario bosses requiring full party coordination

notable_level_patterns.description: Alternating between safe town exploration for recruitment, shopping, and NPC interaction with dangerous dungeon areas containing combat encounters and traps
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Progression from towns to increasingly complex dungeons as story advances

notable_level_patterns.description: Tension maintained through random enemy encounters occurring every few steps during exploration, requiring constant resource management
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Open world and dungeon navigation sequences

notable_level_patterns.description: Party members' unique Personal Actions serve as keys to access hidden areas and items, encouraging strategic party composition and backtracking
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Throughout world as new party members join

notable_level_patterns.description: Stronger boss characters continue fighting after health bar depletion with obscured true remaining health, creating psychological tension and unpredictable battle length
